steps.title: Identify the key phrase in the conclusion
steps.content: The phrase “took time to become apparent” signals that at 12 weeks, EET's advantage wasn't clear, but at 12 months it should be obvious.

steps.title: Match the data pattern to the signal
steps.content: At 12 weeks, EET (268) and EHP (282) are nearly identical; at 12 months, EET drops to 171 while EHP rises to 436. This pattern—starting similar and then diverging sharply in EET's favor—directly illustrates how the result “took time to become apparent.” The other choices either misstate EET's trajectory, claim unsupported distinctions, or show the gap shrinking rather than widening. That matches choice D — D is correct.
